feed.title: Ali’s dumb Blog
feed.subtitle: There is nothing to see here Bozo

entry.title: PortaOS Migration and Rewrite
entry.content:
Hey! this is my first blog and its quite sudden soo stay with me >:(

What is PortaOS?

PortaOS is an Operating system I am developing based entierly on python, I was planning on using one repo for everything, Kernal, and stuff, But that is hard as fuuuck and takes a while to clean, So I will be rewriting the entire project again, but first I will work on the Kernal, Then I will work on the Desktop OS.

Does this mean PortaOS is over?

Nope

yeah thats about it
entry.summary: Hey! this is my first blog and its quite sudden soo stay with me >:(
